head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland, Auckland and Coromandel Peninsula
Cloudy periods. The chance of a light shower about eastern areas.
Waikato to Wellington, including Taumarunui, Taihape, Hawke's Bay and Wairarapa
Fine. Morning fog or frost in sheltered places.
Bay of Plenty, Taupo and Gisborne
Cloud clearing and becoming mainly fine this morning though cloud lingers about East Cape.
Nelson and Marlborough
Areas of morning cloud, otherwise fine
Canterbury, Otago and Southland excluding Stewart Island
Mainly fine, occasional high cloud in the south. Areas of fog or frost this morning.
Buller, Grey and Westland
Cloudy periods with fog possible inland, clearing to fine this afternoon.
Fiordland and Stewart Island
Mostly cloudy with isolated showers.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy periods.
Sunday

North Island: Mostly fine.
South Island: Fine for most. A few showers about the Fiords.
Monday

North Island: Mainly fine.
South Island: Fine for most places. A few showers in Fiordland.
Tuesday

North Island: Mainly fine. The chance of a shower in the north and about Kapiti Coast and Wellington.
South Island: Mostly cloudy with a few showers about Fiordland, otherwise fine apart from early cloud about the east coast.
Chatham Islands
Partly cloudy, with the chance of a shower on Sunday. Westerlies, turning northerly on Tuesday.
Issued: 4:50am Saturday 2 May 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
